summary: Frontend-only testing of badge system and scroll behavior. All features working correctly: slide-up animation, badge positioning (recommendation top-right, delivery bottom-left), color rotation, and scroll retention. No JavaScript errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: RecommendedProducts.js correctly uses React.memo for ProductCard and Section components
DeliveryBadge component is separated and memoized to prevent unnecessary re-renders
useRef is used for scroll container to maintain scroll position
Badge rotation uses setBadgeIndex state that doesn't cause section re-renders due to memo
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badge system working correctly. All 3 recommendation sections (رائج الآن، عروض وخصومات، منتجات جديدة) load without flickering. Scroll retention implemented via React.memo.

trending_section.description: رائج الآن section displays products with proper badges

deals_section.description: عروض وخصومات section displays products with discount badges

new_products_section.description: منتجات جديدة section displays products with جديد badges

delivery_badge_position.description: Delivery badges (شحن مجاني، الأكثر مبيعاً) appear at bottom-left of product images

recommendation_badge_position.description: Recommendation badges (رائج الآن، إعلان، خصم) appear at top-right of product images

badge_color_rotation.description: Badge colors change every 3 seconds (violet → rose → blue → emerald cycle confirmed)

slide_up_animation.description: Badges use slide-up animation (AnimatePresence with y transform) instead of fade

scroll_retention.description: Horizontal scroll position maintained after badge rotation (React.memo prevents re-render)

food_page.description: Food page loads without errors, city selector works

products_page.description: Products page loads correctly with 38+ product links

scroll_fix_verification.fix_method: React.memo for ProductCard and Section components
scroll_fix_verification.result: Scroll position maintained during badge rotation
